productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Winning Stride White Shoe
description: These reebok Winning Stride shoes help you stretch your limits on your daily walks and training schedules. Ideal for walking and everyday activities, these shoes are also stylish enough to be teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic upper with reinforced synthetic stitched overlays for maximum durability Perforations on the forefoot for breathability Central lacing system for snug Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for snug fit Mesh tongue for maximum breathability Midsole DMX Foam midsole for a cushioned, consistently longer lasting ride Outsole Separate heel and toe unit for superior grip on rough surfaces Trustic unit made of durable rubber with vacuum scoop extended to the sides for complete inner arch support Waffle patterned outsole with lugs for maximum traction Flex grooves for natural flexibility of the foot shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
